candidates.why: Component of operating revenues but not the primary total; use as secondary priority after the main total revenue line.
Additional component of operating revenues; use as tertiary priority after total operating revenues and contract revenue.
Best single representation of total revenue/sales (top-line); aggregates contract and reimbursable revenues.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Balance sheet asset, not a revenue line; not suitable for REVT.
Liability representing unearned revenue, not a revenue recognition line.
Long-term unearned revenue liability; not a revenue recognition line for REVT.

variables.notes: Treat REVT as a single revenue measure that may change label; prioritize the aggregate 'Total operating revenues' and fall back to its main components if needed.

candidates.why: Direct operating costs of drilling rigs; best match for cost of goods/services sold.
Direct reimbursable costs closely tied to reimbursable revenue; also part of cost of sales; included as secondary priority.
Overhead/SG&A rather than direct production costs; should not be mapped to COGS.
Financing-related, not production-related; not COGS.
Asset balance, not an expense line; not appropriate for COGS mapping.
Liability for unpaid admin expenses, not the expense itself; not COGS.
Liability, not P&L; not suitable as the COGS expense line.

variables.notes: Both rig operating expenses and reimbursable expenses are direct operating costs tied to revenues; they are provided as a priority list so later processing can use the first available.

candidates.why: Direct operating costs, more akin to COGS than SG&A; should be excluded from SG&A components.
Classic SG&A-type overhead expense; best fit for SG&A components.
Balance sheet liability related to SG&A but not the expense line itself; lower priority than the income statement line.
Liability for various operating expenses; not a clean SG&A P&L component line.

variables.notes: Use the explicit income statement 'Administrative Expenses' line as the SG&A component; balance sheet accruals are excluded per instructions.
No research and development-related line items are present in the provided income statement or balance sheet; XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; primary measure of financing cost for XINT.
Balance sheet liability; not the period expense, so not used for XINT when an income statement interest expense exists.
Represents interest income (the opposite of interest expense); not appropriate for XINT which requires expense.

variables.notes: XINT is mapped to the income statement 'Interest Expense' line as the primary and sufficient representation of interest expense.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate parent/owner equity line is provided, so this is the best proxy for book equity.
Duplicate aggregate equity line (different casing); retained as secondary priority if needed.
Combined total; not an equity-only measure and should not be used for BE when a pure equity total is available.

variables.notes: There is no separate ‘Equity attributable to owners/parent’ line; therefore total equity is used for BE, and MIB will be set to zero to avoid double counting.
No line items for non-controlling interests or minority interest appear on the balance sheet; MIB is treated as zero.
